text:
Market today: Mixed. Tech/AI expansion looks strong (Meta, Apple/Broadcom), but a surging dollar could be a headwind. Geopolitical tensions are also adding to overall market caution. This environment can be tricky for your concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-31.31%) and SPAL (-24.25%) are both leveraged ETFs, well below their stops, and need immediate attention. QQQI (-1.9%) is also flagged for a trim. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on the dollar's strength and any further geopolitical developments; both could impact your tech holdings.

Bottom line: Focus on managing risk in your leveraged positions and staying nimble in this volatile environment.
plays: Review your leveraged ETFs, SOXL (-31.31%) and SPAL (-24.25%). Both are significantly below their stops and need immediate attention to prevent further capital erosion.
Consider trimming QQQI (-1.9%) as flagged by your scanner, potentially reallocating capital if desired.
Given Apple's chip investment news, TSM is on your scanner's ACCUMULATE list; consider a new buy at entry 435-434.56, stop 432.61.
